modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Firefox not working with CRM, keeps loading student details.

full_description_text: 
So, I was trying to use Firefox to look up a student in the CRM, but it just keeps loading and loading. I clicked on the student, and nothing happens, it just sits there. Also, there was this error about a popup being blocked from sp.usd.edu, whatever that means. It's really frustrating because I need to get this info for my work, and now I can't.
short_description: Firefox not working with CRM, keeps loading student details.
